title: Cover Letter AI
shortDesc: Generate tailored, job-specific cover letters instantly using AI.
fullDesc: An AI-powered cover letter generator that takes your resume details and job description, then crafts a personalized, professional cover letter using LLM models. Clean UI with fast API response. Just paste, generate, and apply.

title: AskSheetsAI
shortDesc: Chat with your spreadsheet data using natural language queries.
fullDesc: Upload any CSV or spreadsheet and ask questions in plain English. AskSheetsAI uses LLMs to interpret your data and return accurate, context-aware answers. No SQL or formulas needed. Great for quick data exploration.

title: DreamCatcher
shortDesc: Analyse and explore your dreams with AI-powered insights.
fullDesc: DreamCatcher is an intelligent dream analysis bot that lets you share your dreams and receive AI-generated interpretations, patterns, and emotional analysis. Built for reasoning with a calming, intuitive UI.

title: OrderBot
shortDesc: A conversational AI assistant that handles order queries like status of orders.
fullDesc: OrderBot is a smart chatbot that guides users through orders like status of orders or what orders are placed by a customer all through natural conversation. Powered by an LLM with structured order-state management.

title: RAG Assistant
shortDesc: Ask questions against your own documents using Retrieval-Augmented Generation.
fullDesc: Upload PDFs or text documents and query them with natural language. The RAG Assistant chunks and embeds your content, retrieves the most relevant context, and generates precise, cited answers using your data.
